description: Program-memory v3 adjudicated claim ledger for one program.

required_fields.name: claim_kind
required_fields.description: Claim family such as efficacy, safety, or exposure.

required_fields.name: evidence_scope
required_fields.description: Scope of the evidence supporting the claim.

required_fields.name: primary_source_document_id
required_fields.description: Primary source document anchoring the claim.

optional_fields.name: study_id
optional_fields.description: Study identifier when the claim is study-scoped.

optional_fields.name: supporting_source_document_ids
optional_fields.description: Delimited list of additional supporting source documents.
